questionHtml:
The daughter product, 89Kr, has a half-life of 3.15 min.

Calculate the time required, in minutes, for the mass of 89Kr to fall to 6.25 % of its initial value.

meta.title: The daughter product, 89Kr, has a half-life of 3.15 min. Calculate the time required, in minutes, for the mass of 89Kr to fall to 6.25 % of its initial value.
